basic_details.job_title: TISS Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Manager and Assistant Manager Posts
basic_details.post_name: Manager – Resource Mobilization [Fund Raiser (Senior)] and Assistant Manager – Resource Mobilization [Fund Raiser (Junior)]
basic_details.short_information: Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS) has published the Manager – Resource Mobilization [Fund Raiser (Senior)] and Assistant Manager – Resource Mobilization [Fund Raiser (Junior)] Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 2 positions on a contract basis. Candidates up to 50 years of age holding a Bachelor's or Master's degree in Management, Social Work, Development Studies, Economics, Media, Communications, or a related field are eligible to apply online on or before 23 July 2026. Candidates can easily access the official notification PDF and online application link below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 50 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in Management, Social Work, Development Studies, Economics, Media, Communications, or a related field, Bachelor's or Master's degree in Management, Social Work, Media, Communications, Development Studies, or a related field
qualification.details: Manager – Resource Mobilization [Fund Raiser (Senior)]: Master's degree in Management, Social Work, Development Studies, Economics, Media, Communications, or a related field. A degree in fundraising/development management or a professional fundraising certification (e.g., CFRE) is an added advantage. Minimum 8-10 years of relevant experience in fundraising, resource mobilization, or development, preferably in the education, non-profit, or institutional sector. Demonstrated track record of securing significant grants and donations. Strong knowledge of CSR regulations, grant ecosystems, and donor compliance requirements in India. Assistant Manager – Resource Mobilization [Fund Raiser (Junior)]: Bachelor's or Master's degree in Management, Social Work, Media, Communications, Development Studies, or a related field. 1-3 years of experience in fundraising, marketing, communications, or the development/non-profit sector. Freshers with strong relevant internships may be considered. Familiarity with grant and CSR funding processes is an advantage.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the TISS Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 23-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of TISS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: TISS Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the TISS Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download TISS Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Manager – Resource Mobilization [Fund Raiser (Senior)]: Master's degree in Management, Social Work, Development Studies, Economics, Media, Communications, or a related field. A degree in fundraising/development management or a professional fundraising certification (e.g., CFRE) is an added advantage. Minimum 8-10 years of relevant experience in fundraising, resource mobilization, or development, preferably in the education, non-profit, or institutional sector. Demonstrated track record of securing significant grants and donations. Strong knowledge of CSR regulations, grant ecosystems, and donor compliance requirements in India. Assistant Manager – Resource Mobilization [Fund Raiser (Junior)]: Bachelor's or Master's degree in Management, Social Work, Media, Communications, Development Studies, or a related field. 1-3 years of experience in fundraising, marketing, communications, or the development/non-profit sector. Freshers with strong relevant internships may be considered. Familiarity with grant and CSR funding processes is an advantage.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age: 50 years for all posts.

rows.event: Last Date of Filling of Online Applications

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the TISS Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 23-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of TISS to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for TISS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting online applications for the TISS Manager and Assistant Manager posts is 23 July 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in TISS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Manager – Resource Mobilization [Fund Raiser (Senior)] and Assistant Manager – Resource Mobilization [Fund Raiser (Junior)] posts at TISS.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for TISS Various Posts?
faq.answer: The application mode for the TISS Manager and Assistant Manager recruitment is Online. Interested and eligible candidates must submit their applications through the official website of Tata Institute of Social Sciences.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for TISS Manager and Assistant Manager posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the TISS Manager and Assistant Manager posts is 50 years. There might be age relaxations for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for the Manager – Resource Mobilization (Senior) post at TISS?
faq.answer: The salary for the Manager – Resource Mobilization [Fund Raiser (Senior)] post is Rs. 150000/- per month. This is a contract-based position with attractive remuneration.

faq.question: Q6. What are the educational qualifications required for these posts?
faq.answer: For Manager (Senior), a Master's degree in relevant fields is required. For Assistant Manager (Junior), a Bachelor's or Master's degree in Management, Social Work, Media, Communications, Development Studies, or a related field is needed.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for TISS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 500/- for General/OBC candidates, Rs. 125/- for SC/ST candidates, and Nil for Women candidates. Fees must be paid online as part of the application process.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for TISS Manager and Assistant Manager posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts at TISS includes a Personal Interaction followed by Document Verification. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the job location be for these TISS posts?
faq.answer: The job location for the Manager and Assistant Manager – Resource Mobilization posts will be Mumbai, Maharashtra. Candidates should be prepared to relocate if they are selected for these positions.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website for TISS recruitment?
faq.answer: The official website for Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS) where candidates can find more details and apply online is www.tiss.edu. All important updates and notifications will be published there.
